name: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk engages in the forestry, agriculture and plantation, transportation, plant construction, service, and trading industries in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Palm Oil, Wood Products, and Others. The company plants, produces, and sells palm oil products, including crude palm oil, palm kernel, and palm kernel oil. It also provides various wood products, such as block boards and plywood, as well as panels and engineered floors. As of December 31, 2019, the company had 112,450 hectares of planted areas of palm oil plantations. It also exports its products to Europe, Central America, Canada, Japan, Asia, and the Middle East. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
